◎简　　介  

　　"Cua Lai Vo Bau" is a perfect love story of Trong Thoai and Nha Linh. But life was not as dreaming as Nha Linh's ex-girlfriend Quy Khanh suddenly moxiacc appeared and caused a series of disturbances in the girl's heart. So where will this love triangle go?
